_comment: NPC: Green Devil (Green Scorpion) (瀯욥춸 / 瀯욤쓮). Canon ID: N132. Per user directive: every miscellaneous NPC from RI must be accounted for. Prime Directive: Reality is objective; cultivation changes understanding, not existence. Every being described here exists independently of the player's perception.
name: Green Devil (Green Scorpion)
note: Poison-aspected devil antagonist on Green Devil Continent

dao_heart.note: 0-100. A cracked Dao heart blocks breakthrough regardless of Qi. Per canon: Wang Lin's Dao heart is famously tested at every major realm.
